Tribal police, BIA, and federal Indian Country prosecutors all report incidents to FBI UCR; reporting completeness varies year-to-year, producing spurious volatility in crime rates that does NOT reflect real victimization changes. National Crime Victimization Survey supplements (BJS) document genuinely elevated victimization rates in tribal communities, so SOME of the elevated rates are real signal.

caveats.label: Reservation / tribal-land county
caveats.note: County contains substantial tribal land (Menominee Indian Reservation (entire county)). Tribal police, BIA, and federal Indian Country prosecutors all report incidents to FBI UCR; reporting completeness varies year-to-year, producing spurious volatility in crime rates that does NOT reflect real victimization changes. National Crime Victimization Survey supplements (BJS) document genuinely elevated victimization rates in tribal communities, so SOME of the elevated rates are real signal.

caveats.label: Resident vs. daily population denominator
caveats.note: Manhattan (NY): resident pop ~1.66M but daily commuter+tourist pop ~3-4M. Per-100k rates vs. resident denominator overstate by ~2-3x.

caveats.label: Resident vs. daily population denominator
caveats.note: DC: resident pop ~700k but daily commuter+tourist pop substantially higher. Federal-jurisdiction incidents + National Mall events inflate per-resident rates.

caveats.label: Resident vs. daily population denominator
caveats.note: Clark County NV (Las Vegas Strip): tourist pop ~40M/year vs ~2.3M residents. Per-resident crime rates are misleading.

caveats.label: Resident vs. daily population denominator
caveats.note: Orange County CA (Disneyland area): tourist + theme-park workforce inflate the daily population denominator.

caveats.label: Resident vs. daily population denominator
caveats.note: La Paz County AZ: hosts Quartzsite (winter snowbird population ~50k vs ~17k residents); also Colorado River Indian Tribes jurisdictional overlap.
